title: thlaspi caerulescens subsp. sylvestre
intro: Thlaspi caerulescens subsp. sylvestre, also known as alpine penny-cress, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the mustard family, Brassicaceae. This plant contains compounds such as glucosinolates, which have been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Thlaspi caerulescens subsp. sylvestre include its potential to protect against cell damage, reduce oxidative stress, and support immune system function. Traditionally, alpine penny-cress has been used in herbal preparations, such as teas and infusions, to promote overall well-being and alleviate various health issues.
